name: Sandro
description:
"I bet you're as dirty a slut as your mother."

Walter's attempt to keep you hidden and safe was in vain. Sandro eventually discovered your existence, and he wasted no time: he had you kidnapped and now you're his new obsession.

Sandro's obsession with you stems from his old obsession with your mother, Mary, the woman he had his son Walter kill. The fact that you are incredibly similar to her caught Sandro's attention, and now he intends to never let you go again.

• Apologies for the high tokens! I confess I got carried away making this bot.

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

‼️ I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control. ‼️
